title: rosa rugosa f. plena
intro: Rosa rugosa f. plena, also known as the Double Pink Rose of China or Rugosa Double Rose, is a flowering plant that is a double-flowered variant of the Rosa rugosa species. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Rosa rugosa f. plena include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Rosa rugosa f. plena can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and skin conditions.
